description_long: This is a large, rectangular stone obelisk set within a walled, raised platform, likely serving as a memorial or monument. The obelisk rises from a central plinth and is surrounded by a low, square enclosure with four corner posts and a set of steps leading up to the main area. The monument features several inscribed plaques and vertical engravings, with some visible text in what appears to be Japanese script. The base is paved and includes additional smaller stone markers and benches, with patches of moss and weathering visible along the edges. The rear of the obelisk displays a unique, sculptural design with curved, interlocking stone elements, adding a modern artistic touch to the otherwise traditional structure.
description: A large stone obelisk with engraved inscriptions, set on a raised, walled platform with steps, benches, and sculptural rear elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main obelisk, inscribed plaques, and the entrance steps leading up to the platform.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the sculptural, curved stone elements behind the obelisk and the mossy edges of the enclosure.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the obelisk's vertical engravings and the weathered, partially broken enclosure wall.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing the steps, benches, and the full arrangement of the monument's base and surrounding features.
attribute_inscription: Vertical inscriptions in Japanese script are visible on the front and side faces of the obelisk, with additional plaques on the base. The text is engraved and appears weathered but mostly legible.
attribute_ornamentation: The rear of the obelisk features a modern, sculptural arrangement of curved stone elements, adding artistic ornamentation. No other decorative motifs or reliefs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a raised, rectangular stone platform with four corner posts, a low perimeter wall, and a set of steps at the front. The surface is paved and includes several stone benches and smaller markers, with some moss and weathering present.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and rectangular, with no additional decoration or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a low stone wall, steps, benches, smaller stone markers, and patches of moss and vegetation along the edges.
